arts.ttl: Sheff Utd, Burnley should be very scared if Leeds United build on new “bright spark”
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Manor Solomon was the star of the show when the Whites cruised past Oxford United last time out, and his performance is hopefully a sign of things to come. Having found it hard to bring a sustained level of good performances at Elland Road since joining, Farke teased the prospect of a sharper Solomon coming into this clash at home, and he was correct.

arts.ttl: Leeds United ‘serious’ about signing player – Whites offer could arrive as soon as January
arts.sum: Leeds United are keen on signing Mjällby AIF goalkeeper Noel Törnqvist in the winter market. That’s according to Fotboll Direkt, who say Leeds are showing ‘serious interest’ in the 22-year-old. The Leeds links aren’t new as they were credited with an interest in the stopper a year ago. Championship average attendance figures: Leeds rank high Elland Road has always been a ground that every fans looks forward to visiting in the calendar, and we have seen that for sure this season in the Championship.

arts.ttl: 'We are calmer than people think' Leeds United's on-pitch talks under pressure
arts.sum: “We have been in this situation many times this season already, but we are calmer than people think,” he said. Gnonto spoke to the media during the club’s annual Christmas visit to young patients in hospital, at Leeds General Infirmary, and was asked about what the players are saying to one another when they are met with low blocks like those at Deepdale this month.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Stoke City with Pascal Struijk and Joe Rodon decisions made

arts.ttl: 'He was a great player': Archie Gray now names Leeds icon as one of his two idols alongside Lionel Messi
Leeds look to have green light to sign 21-year-old with 9 G/A in 18 games
arts.sum: As the January transfer window approaches, Daniel Farke looks to have got the green light to sign an exciting 21-year-old for Leeds United. The all whites find themselves second in the Championship, ahead of three fixtures in less than a week against Stoke City, Derby County and Blackburn Rovers. Daniel Farke will surely be keen […] The post Leeds look to have green light to sign 21-year-old with 9 G/A in 18 games appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Narcis Pelach and the make-or-break moment that will test Stoke City's nerve
arts.sum: “It took time for it to click there but we believed and we kept working with the players and we convinced them, we had the summer window that helped us a lot to build – the January one was not great but the summer one was good – and we had a team that allowed us to do what we wanted to do much more efficiently and it clicked. Pelach reflects that it took time to implement what he wanted because it was so different to what had come before – but the end result was worth it if you have the patience and he hopes there are echoes of that now at Stoke.

arts.ttl: Boxing Day's Championship predictions including Stoke vs. Leeds
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Stoke vs. Leeds.

arts.ttl: Stoke City boss 'feeling the support' of Jon Walters and John Coates
arts.sum: Narcis Pelach has been given the support of John Coates and Jon Walters this week as he insists he has the energy and belief to turn things around at Stoke City. “I had a long conversation with John Coates (on Monday), another one with Jon Walters and I’m feeling their support,” he said.
